metadata.description: Collection of short, pratical, and personal Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: proof-read
plugins.description: Proofread markdown documents in four passes: auto-fix typos and grammar, then annotate sentence- and document-level issues with review tags.

plugins.name: learn-everything
plugins.description: Turn any video, audio, or text into structured learning notes. Transcribes with GPU-accelerated Whisper, splits into semantic chapters with exact timestamps, and distills active-recall takeaways.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Adversarially review anything — code, docs, design, config. One independent subagent per round, each with an opposing bias: hunt defects, delete, doubt assumptions, consume it, attack it. Executed evidence over speculation, findings grouped by round.
